relations.subject: White-browed shama
relations.evidence: This species is found in a few protected areas including Bataan National Park, Northern Sierra Madre Natural Park, Angat Watershed Forest Reserve, Mount Makiling, Kalbario–Patapat Natural Park, Bicol Natural Park and Bulusan Volcano Natural Park but actual protection from deforestation is still lax

relations.subject: White-browed shama
relations.evidence: This species' main threat is habitat loss with wholesale clearance of forest habitats as a result of logging, agricultural conversion and mining activities occurring within the range
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。
